overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character climbing a rocky mountainside trail. The character ascends from a forested base area up to an exposed cliff edge overlooking a large body of water with distant islands, then traverses along the steep cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside base with scattered trees

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to climbing up the rock face

agents.ego_description: walking toward the rock formation and beginning to climb up the lower slope

entered.detail: tall rocky hillside dominating the background with layered stone textures
flat dirt and grass area at the base of the hill
green leafy trees surrounding the base of the rock formation

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the base of a large rocky hillside surrounded by scattered trees. She walks forward across the dirt ground and starts climbing up the rock face, transitioning from flat terrain to the inclined slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: climbing up through dense vegetation and trees on the mountainside, pushing through bushes

entered.detail: thick green bushes and undergrowth covering the slope
thick tree trunks and branches creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: Moving through a densely vegetated section of the mountainside, the character climbs upward through trees and bushes. The sky is mostly obscured by the forest canopy, creating diffused lighting as she navigates the narrow dirt trail.

events.description: emerging from tree cover onto exposed cliff edge with ocean and distant islands revealed

agents.ego_description: reaching the cliff top and beginning to walk along the edge with expansive ocean views to the left

entered.detail: large body of blue water visible beyond the cliff edge
hazy mountain islands visible across the water
steep rocky cliff wall rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: Breaking through the tree line, the scene opens to a dramatic cliff edge with panoramic ocean views. The character emerges from the forest onto exposed rock with steep cliffs on the right and a vast body of water with distant islands visible to the left.

events.description: passing by a dark cave entrance carved into the cliff wall

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff ledge with the steep rock face on the right and ocean drop on the left

entered.detail: dark opening in the cliff wall suggesting a cave or hollow

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the narrow cliffside path, with the steep rock wall now close on the right and the ocean visible far below to the left. She passes a dark cave entrance in the cliff wall while maintaining her balance on the exposed ledge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a sheltered forested base up to an exposed, panoramic cliffside overlooking the ocean. It begins with the character walking across dirt ground at the foot of a rocky hillside before transitioning from the flat terrain onto an inclined slope. As she climbs higher, the scene shifts into a densely vegetated section where the forest canopy obscures the sky and creates diffused lighting along a narrow trail. The environment then opens abruptly as she breaks through the tree line onto exposed rock, revealing a dramatic cliff edge and a vast body of water with distant islands. Finally, the camera follows her along a narrow ledge with a steep rock wall to the right, passing a dark cave entrance while the ocean remains visible far below.
